title: Dropdown Menu Component
content: This file exports a set of components for creating dropdown menus, built on top of `@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu`. It provides a customizable and accessible way to implement dropdown functionality in your application. **Purpose:** To offer a reusable and themable set of components for dropdown menus, aligning with common UI patterns and accessibility standards. **Key Exports:** * `DropdownMenu`: The root component for the dropdown menu. * `DropdownMenuTrigger`: The element that triggers the dropdown to open. * `DropdownMenuContent`: The container for the dropdown menu items. * `DropdownMenuItem`: A single selectable item within the dropdown. * `DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`: An item that supports a checked/unchecked state. * `DropdownMenuRadioItem`: An item that supports a radio button selection state. * `DropdownMenuLabel`: A label for grouping or describing menu items. * `DropdownMenuSeparator`: A visual separator between menu items. * `DropdownMenuShortcut`: Displays keyboard shortcuts associated with menu items. * `DropdownMenuGroup`: Groups related menu items. * `DropdownMenuPortal`: Renders the dropdown content in a portal, typically at the end of the body. * `DropdownMenuSub`: Enables nested sub-menus. * `DropdownMenuSubContent`: The content for a sub-menu. * `DropdownMenuSubTrigger`: The trigger for a sub-menu. * `DropdownMenuRadioGroup`: Manages the selected radio item within a group. **Usage Example:** ```typescript import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu'; function MyDropdown() { return ( console.log('Item 1 clicked')}> Item 1 ⌘A console.log('Item 2 clicked')}> Item 2 console.log('Item 3 clicked')} inset> Item 3 (Inset) ); } ```
